__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Monolith,Portonaccio Sarcophagus,The Queen's Necklace,Fasti,Baekje Kannon Statue,Barcode
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 10 Home Comfort, Snail Oblivion Power +24; Home Comfort: 300/300
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Oblivion Power Boost]]
